_comment: Config for each org. Add a new entry, then point that org's iframe at ?org=THE_KEY. All fields except 'name' and 'primary' are optional and fall back to sensible defaults.

mvysa.name: MVYSA
mvysa.footerNote: Age groups follow Washington Youth Soccer's August 1 – July 31 birth year window.
